commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fe6651072bd3ba2a008cec2d6734c70f6507da58)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared progress-draft underscore balancing in `src/channels/streaming.ts` plus a formatter regression test for truncated italic commentary.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +16. Total +28 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current Discord commentary wraps `_line_` before shared compaction, and a read-only simulation of the PR helper shows internal underscores make the proposed balancing fail or mangle text. I did not run a live Discord guild repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer or contributor should revise the narrow formatter defect and add real Discord proof; ClawSweeper should not bypass the mock-only proof gate for this external PR.

target.title: fix(discord): balance truncated progress italics
target.body:
## Summary
- Fixes Discord progress drafts that can show a literal leading underscore when an italic commentary line is truncated.
- The shared progress-draft formatter now strips an unmatched leading italic delimiter after compaction, matching the existing unmatched-backtick protection.
- Adds regression coverage for truncated commentary-style progress lines.

## Linked context
Closes #88895.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
- Behavior or issue addressed: Discord `streaming.mode: "progress"` commentary could render `_Checking...` literally when line compaction removed the closing `_`.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw contributor checkout.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused formatter regression in `src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts`.
- Evidence after fix: the regression expects the truncated commentary line to render as `Checking whether the Discord progress draft keeps markdown…`, without a leading `_`.
- Observed result after fix: focused Vitest shard passed.
- What was not tested: live Discord guild progress-message edit flow.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: this contributor environment does not have a safe Discord bot/guild setup for live channel proof.

## Tests and validation
- `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/channels/streaming.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_OFFLINE=true corepack pnpm test src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` passed 1 Vitest shard / 29 tests.
- `git diff --check -- src/channels/streaming.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts`

## Risk checklist
- User-visible behavior changed: Yes, only for compacted progress-draft text with unmatched leading italic underscores.
- Config, environment, or migration behavior changed: No.
- Security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior changed: No.
- Highest-risk area: over-stripping underscores in compacted progress text. Mitigated by only stripping when the compacted output has an odd underscore count and starts with `_`, which matches the broken italic-commentary shape.

## Current review state
Ready for maintainer review; no live Discord proof is available from this contributor environment.
target.author: charles-openclaw
